basic_details.short_information: Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CARI) Consultant (Ayurveda) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CARI. A total of 2 Consultant (Ayurveda) vacancies have been announced through the CARI Consultant (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Ayurveda, Graduation in Ayurveda with additional 2 years experience, M.D. (Kayachikitsa) and M.S. (Shalya) (Desirable), Knowledge of Computer applications such as MS word, Excel and Power point (Desirable)
qualification.details: Consultant (Ayurveda): Post Graduation in Ayurveda or Graduation in Ayurveda with additional 2 years experience. Desirable: M.D. (Kayachikitsa) and M.S. (Shalya). Knowledge of Computer applications such as MS word, Excel and Power point.

content_sections.heading: CARI Consultant (Ayurveda) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CARI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CARI Consultant (Ayurveda) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CARI Consultant (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant (Ayurveda): Post Graduation in Ayurveda or Graduation in Ayurveda with additional 2 years experience. Desirable: M.D. (Kayachikitsa) and M.S. (Shalya). Knowledge of Computer applications such as MS word, Excel and Power point.

content_sections.heading: CARI Consultant (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CARI Consultant (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CARI Consultant (Ayurveda) recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and the interview is scheduled for 27th July 2026. Candidates should report for registration between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM on the same day.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Post Graduation in Ayurveda or Graduation in Ayurveda with an additional 2 years of experience. Desirable qualifications include M.D. (Kayachikitsa) and M.S. (Shalya), along with computer application knowledge.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant (Ayurveda) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant (Ayurveda) position announced by CARI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Consultant (Ayurveda) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Patiala, Punjab, 147001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to report for registration between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM on the day of the walk-in interview.
